description: List of names accompanied by sums of money and/or quantities of wheat. In Judaeo-Arabic. Presumably a contributions list, as it begins with Sayyidnā and 3/4 dinar. Other names include: Hiba al-Mūrid; Abū l-Riḍā b. Hilāl; the widow of al-Najīb; Abū l-Faraj al-Tājir; Ibn Ghulayb; his brother-in-law Abū Zikrī al-Ṭabīb; al-Kohen al-Siqillī; Abū ʿAlī al-Bilbaysī b. al-Bustānī; Ibn al-Muṭrib Ibn Nufayʿ; al-kātib b. al-shammāʿ; Ibn al-Nāqid; Ṭayyib b. al-Sarjās(?); ʿEli al-Parnas b. Abū Saʿd; Abū l-Faraj b. Ḥātim b. ʿAllān; Abū l-Faraj al-Ghuzūlī; Ṭayyib al-Bazzāz; Hiba al-Simsār b. Kallām.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
